arcs.title: The Third Fold
arcs.summary: Eve-of-departure edition complete. Christine has closed the planning phase and confirmed the coordinates. Steve is at nine out of ten. The pencil mark in the survey margin has quietly settled which 1962 team was wrong, though no one has said so aloud. The Jeep is ready, Adam's recommendation has been absorbed, and Orvell's postcard sits beside the brass duck. Tomorrow they go. Day 4 resolves on Saturday: the ridgeline is reached, the dispute is settled by presence rather than paper, and whatever 'Disputed (Atmospheric)' actually means is found out at first hand. Resolution should be warm, funny, and true — Christine finds the thing, Steve has already quietly seen it, and the brass duck turns out to have been pointing somewhere worth pointing.
